text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
…Hey, hey… Thanks. 
Thanks for the warm welcome. 
…I'm Lucky Lilac.

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
Right, now we've got a good show for y— Huh? …Agh! 
My partner's in the friggin' seats! 
Hey, bozo, what da heck are ya sittin' there clappin' for?!

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
Hey, don't get all upset on me! You're makin' it look like I'm 
da bad guy here! C'mon, hurry, get on stage! We're up!

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
Back off! Ya can't just say "'scuse me" then get all up in my 
face! Scared the heck outta me. Ya forget or what? 
Your spot is——

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
There we go! On my right! See, I knew you'd remember. 
…Just makin' sure here, but ya remember why you're on my 
right, yeah?

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
Yep, keep to the inside and ya might even beat me… 
…What da heck are ya talkin' about? 
Since when were ya a racer, Trainer!?

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text: …So, anyway, we're a manzai duo of Umamusume and trainer. Weird, ain't it? But there's a story behind this——

——It was a lovely spring day, and the buds were just 
beginning to bloom. When I visited the track, the 
trainers were all looking at a single spot.

——Excuse me, ma'am, but would ya be so kind as to let me go 
next?

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
…I am Lucky Lilac, and I will be running 1600m. 
And to all the lovely spectators… 
Thank ya kindly for watching me.

As soon as she appeared, a sense of awe filled the air. With her 
gentle Kansai accent, and the elegance she carried herself with, 
she quickly became the center of attention. Then——

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
Huff… Huff… 
Hut!!!

She was obviously on another level from other Umamusume. 
One look at her proud display as all it took to understand just 
how talented she was. Her graceful, refined, racing form was—

text_block_list.name: Instructor A
text_block_list.text:
Excellent as always, Lucky Lilac-san. You kept your head cool, 
and saved your energy for the final spurt. 
That skill will serve you well.

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
Why, thank ya kindly. I do make a conscious effort to 
control myself… So I'm honored. I promise to polish my 
self-control even further.

text_block_list.name: Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
That Lucky Lilac's racing is something else! 
She's a real standout in her generation.

text_block_list.name: Trainer B
text_block_list.text:
Plus she always listens to what her instructors say, like a true 
honor student… ——It's a real shame she can't debut…

text_block_list.name: Trainer B
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you don't know? Uh… How about you come back here 
after classes end? Do that, and you'll find out what's going 
on with her.

I was curious about what exactly the other trainers were 
talking about, so I visited the track after classes like they 
told me…

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
………… 
…I've been awaitin' your arrival.

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text: ——Orfevre-san.

No one could make a peep in the face of her overwhelming 
presence, and for good reason. Standing there was an 
Umamusume who made her mark on history in a blaze of glory—

The "Tyrant", Orfevre. Winner of the Satsuki Sho, Japanese 
Derby, and the Kikuka Sho—— The seventh Umamusume in 
history to win the Classic Triple Crown. Not only that——

She nearly made Japan's long-held dream of winning 
the Prix de l'Arc de Triomphe with two second place 
finishes. …She was a world-famous Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
I cannot thank ya enough for granting me a moment of 
your precious time. I will put in all the effort I can 
to make today the day ya give me your approval.

text_block_list.name: Orfevre
text_block_list.text:
Very well. 
——Come.

The two of them started a one-on-one race. Considering it was 
between a pre-debut and a senior-class racer, even scheduling 
this race should have been difficult—

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
Ngh… 
Haaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaah!!

text_block_list.name: Orfevre
text_block_list.text:
…So it remains beyond your reach. 
This is over.

text_block_list.name: Orfevre
text_block_list.text: Hah!!!!

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
………………Kh!! 
Orfevre-san——!!

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
…Thank ya very much. I suppose… I failed again today. 
I promise I will make an effort to train myself to be more 
compelling next time.

text_block_list.name: Orfevre
text_block_list.text:
We have no need of promises. 
——Speak with racing, not words.

text_block_list.name: Trainer B
text_block_list.text:
——Another one-on-one race, huh. 
Just how long are they gonna keep doing this…?
choice_data_list: So… this wasn't the first time?
So… this wasn't the first time?

text_block_list.name: Trainer B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. She's been challenging Orfevre all the time lately. 
Same thing always happens every weekend after school. 
The two of them run——
"And Lucky Lilac always loses. Every time." —— Was she really trying to beat the Orfevre?

This went way beyond a difference in skill. Her opponent was 
practically a living legend. But even then… she persevered, and 
continued to challenge Orfevre again and again.

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
——So that's why ya came to talk to me? 
Well, I'm mighty grateful for your concern.

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
But it's not as complicated as ya might think. 
I'm waiting 'till I get Orfe-san's approval before I debut, 
that's all.
choice_data_list: So… You want to beat her first?
So… You want to beat her first?

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
Well, that all depends on what it takes to earn her approval… 
——But as far as I'm concerned, I'm not giving up.

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text: ——Once again… Thank ya kindly for having me today.

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
…I'll show ya the fruits of my newest training today. 
And… I will have ya approve my debut.

I saw her race Orfevre the next week, and the next. 
Every time, she would fearlessly challenge the tyrant——

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
…………Kkgh! 
…Still… not enough…!

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
——…… 
I'll get there. Next time. I ain't givin' up. 
…Not never.

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
…Right. 
Feels like I ran out of steam at the end there… 
I'll do more reps on the slope.
choice_data_list: (She always gets up to race Orfe again.)

text_block_list.text:
Her gentle demeanor belied a will of steel. As that image of her 
impressed deeper on me, the more I wondered—— She seemed 
so perfect. So what was it that she was missing?
